methods.label: Residents (origins)
methods.desc: WorldPop population within 500 m of the stop — where trips begin.

methods.label: Destinations (attraction)
methods.desc: OSM trip generators (schools, malls, clinics…) within 500 m — where people go.

methods.label: Gravity accessibility
methods.desc: Sum of reachable activity with distance decay (≤ 2.5 km) — how much a stop can reach.

methods.label: Network centrality
methods.desc: Betweenness on the bus network — structural through-traffic, independent of land use.

methods.label: Composite (ensemble)
methods.desc: Average percentile of the other four methods.

meta.calibration: Demand calibrated to real Abu Dhabi Link ride totals (2023, 4 zones)
